posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Book your spot for today’s webinar here: https://monday.zoom.us/webinar/register/4316038847354/WN_ZDeE-h-7SoiA1e1ZkifTkA

We’re hosting a webinar today at 11am EST where we’ll showcase a range of exciting and impactful new features live

Get ready to learn more about:

  • The improvements in the timeline
  • Subitems support in automations + other new capabilities
  • MS Teams & Adobe Cloud Creative integrations
  • Board improvements

Plus, a sneak peek into the Apps Marketplace following our big announcement yesterday. And, a special spooky makeover for one your favorite features coming to your accounts very soon

Don’t miss out - book your spot here: https://monday.zoom.us/webinar/register/4316038847354/WN_ZDeE-h-7SoiA1e1ZkifTkA

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Julia-monday.com how are you doing? Also still working from home?
I just came across this message and wasn’t able to join. Is it possible to get my hands on the webinar in a later stage? Always curious about new stuff ahead of us. Would be nice thanks!
